name: family-finance-copilot
description: Reusable Markdown skill for household finance workspace setup, memory management, IPS, allocation, risk buckets, decision memos, reviews, and free/no-key market data lookup.

authoring_notes.source_framework: Abstracted from a personal second-brain household finance workflow, with all personal names, balances, holdings, accounts, broker details, and life-specific facts removed.
authoring_notes.writing_standard: Follows high-quality skill structure: lightweight SKILL.md, progressive references, scripts for deterministic work, templates for reusable outputs, explicit anti-patterns and completion checks.
authoring_notes.privacy: No credentials, tokens, account identifiers, or real personal financial values are included.
